Operation 'update_candidate' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are minimal. Added clarity about what can be updated, required parameters, expected inputs, return value, partial update support, and authentication requirements to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing candidate's profile information and attributes. Requires the candidate ID in the path. Accepts candidate data in the request body (e.g., name, email, phone, status, tags, custom fields). Returns the updated candidate object with all current attributes. Partial updates are supported - only provided fields will be modified. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are minimal. Added clarity about what can be updated, required parameters, expected inputs, return value, partial update support, and authentication requirements to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'list_candidate_activities' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description was empty, so added context about what activities are tracked, pagination support, required parameters, return format, and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of activities for a specific candidate, including interactions, status changes, notes, and other tracked events. Requires the candidate ID in the path. Returns an array of activity objects with timestamps, types, and descriptions. Useful for tracking candidate engagement history and recruitment progress.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description was empty, so added context about what activities are tracked, pagination support, required parameters, return format, and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'create_client' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Summary is clear and action-oriented. data.description_suggestion: Creates a new client (hiring organization) in the recruitment platform.
